overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza. The scene features bright sunlight, palm trees, outdoor dining areas, food carts, and towering buildings covered in digital billboards. The player character stands up from a table and walks through the bustling pedestrian area.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza with palm trees and food stalls

events.description: character stands up from seated position at outdoor table and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: seated at an outdoor cafe table, then stands up and begins walking through the pedestrian plaza

notable_agents.action: woman with short blonde hair and headband seated at the table across from camera

tall building with large digital billboard displaying red and white graphics
building with yellow and green facade and escalator visible

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view seated at an outdoor cafe table in a futuristic urban plaza. A woman sits across at a red plastic chair. Around 4 seconds, the character stands up and begins walking forward through the plaza, passing palm trees and approaching a food stall with a striped umbrella. The environment is bright and sunny with modern buildings surrounding the open pedestrian area.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with food vendors and political signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza past various pedestrians and outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: woman with braided blonde hair sitting in red chair holding a green fan
man in orange tank top and white pants walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large white sign with black VOTE text mounted on building facade
blue food cart with red and white striped umbrella
large vertical screen displaying animated advertisement with cartoon character
tall building with grey geometric facade and dark windows

segments.scene_description: The camera walks through the bustling plaza, passing a woman with braided hair seated nearby. The scene features a prominent VOTE sign and a blue food cart with a colorful umbrella on the right. Various pedestrians walk in different directions across the concrete plaza. The environment transitions from the initial dining area toward a more commercial zone with large digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban corridor with towering digital billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the tall buildings and overhead billboards

agents.ego_description: walking forward while observing the surroundings and looking up at the towering architecture

notable_agents.action: woman in purple dress with red hair walking past camera

entered.detail: massive horizontal digital billboard displaying colorful flower graphics
vertical red banner with MAGNOLIA text and circular logo
very tall skyscraper with reflective glass facade rising above the plaza
large vertical banner with BIG text in white letters
elevated walkway or bridge connecting buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving deeper into the urban canyon, passing the food cart area. The perspective shifts to look upward at towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards, including a prominent flower advertisement. The environment feels more enclosed as the camera approaches the tall glass towers. A red MAGNOLIA banner is visible on the right, and the density of advertisements increases, creating a classic cyberpunk cityscape atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a quiet outdoor cafe into the heart of a towering, advertisement-dense urban canyon. It begins seated at a table across from a woman in a red chair before the camera stands and moves forward through a sunlit plaza past palm trees and a striped food stall. As the camera progresses through the bustling pedestrian area, the scene shifts from the dining space toward a commercial zone featuring a blue food cart and a prominent VOTE sign. The perspective then glides deeper into the city, passing a red Magnolia banner as the open plaza gives way to an enclosed atmosphere of glass towers. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal massive digital billboards and flower advertisements that dominate the skyline of the cyberpunk cityscape.
